overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city during a heavy rainstorm. The camera moves along a covered promenade lined with palm trees, past stairs and graffiti-covered walls, transitioning to a wooden waterfront deck with scattered debris, ending at an open water plaza with bamboo groves. The scene features pedestrians with umbrellas, towering futuristic architecture, and elevated highways overhead.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked futuristic promenade lined with palm trees. The camera moves forward under a partial concrete canopy, with outdoor café seating visible to the right and towering cyberpunk skyscrapers looming in the hazy distance. Pedestrians with umbrellas walk in the opposite direction.

wooden deck and water canal become visible on right side

wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
piles of garbage bags and scattered trash along the wall

segments.scene_description: The camera passes a large concrete staircase on the left where people are ascending and descending. A graffiti-covered wall becomes prominent on the left, with trash and debris scattered at its base. The covered roof ends, exposing the scene to the heavy rain. On the right, the paved tiles transition to a wooden deck alongside a water canal.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront boardwalk with trash and debris

events.description: ground surface changes from paved tiles to wooden decking along water edge
scene opens to wide water plaza with view of bamboo grove across the water

agents.ego_description: walking along wooden waterfront deck, passing pedestrians with umbrellas

calm water surface reflecting the rain and surrounding structures
metal railing with wooden top along the water edge

segments.scene_description: The camera moves onto a wooden boardwalk alongside a water canal. The graffiti wall recedes into the distance on the left. The deck is littered with trash and debris. Pedestrians with colorful umbrellas walk along the railing. The scene opens up to reveal a wide water plaza with a bamboo grove visible across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: open water plaza with bamboo grove and elevated highways

events.description: camera turns to reveal wide view across water plaza to bamboo grove and distant buildings

agents.ego_description: walking along water edge while looking across the plaza at the bamboo grove and architecture

entered.detail: large open water feature reflecting the sky and surrounding structures
dense cluster of bamboo trees on the far side of the water

segments.scene_description: The camera reaches an open water plaza with a panoramic view across the water to a bamboo grove on the far side. The elevated highway structures frame the scene overhead. The wooden boardwalk continues along the water's edge, with the graffiti wall and trash now behind. The scene emphasizes the scale of the futuristic architecture and natural elements combined.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked cyberpunk promenade that gradually opens into a wide waterfront plaza. It begins under a partial concrete canopy lined with palm trees and outdoor café seating, moving past pedestrians with umbrellas toward towering skyscrapers in the hazy distance. As the camera passes a concrete staircase and a graffiti-covered wall, the overhead roof ends, exposing the scene to heavy rain while the paved tiles transition into a wooden deck. The movement then shifts onto a littered boardwalk alongside a water canal, where the graffiti wall recedes to reveal a panoramic view of a distant bamboo grove. Finally, the camera reaches an open water plaza framed by massive elevated highway structures, emphasizing the scale of the futuristic architecture integrated with natural elements.
